title: Preparation of Tissue Culture Plates for Neural Rosettes and Progenitors
author: Celeste M M. Karch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x85fry6

steps.title: Coat 3 wells of a 6-well...
steps.instruction: Coat 3 wells of a 6-well plate with 1 mL Poly-L-Ornithine (PLO) for 02:00:00 or overnight in humidified incubator.

steps.title: Aspirate off PLO and rinse 3 times with DMEM/F12
steps.instruction: Aspirate off PLO and rinse 3 times with DMEM/F12.

steps.title: Dilute laminin to 10 μg/mL final...
steps.instruction: Dilute laminin to 10 μg/mL final in cold DMEM/F12 and add 1 mL/well of solution to PLO coated plates.

steps.title: Incubate for 02:00:00 or overnight in humidified incubator
steps.instruction: Incubate for 02:00:00 or overnight in humidified incubator.
